vocab.meaning: chụp ảnh liên tục (thường là vì hào hứng)
vocab.example: When I reached the summit and saw the sunrise, I couldn't help but snap away to make sure I didn't miss a single moment.

vocab.meaning: cất giữ kỹ lưỡng (vào bộ sưu tập hoặc nơi an toàn)
vocab.example: I love having those scenic shots tucked away in my digital gallery so I can revisit them whenever I feel stressed.

vocab.meaning: nổi bật, thu hút sự chú ý
vocab.example: I only take photos when a particular landscape stands out; I'm not a fan of capturing mundane scenery.

vocab.meaning: cắt bỏ (những phần không mong muốn trong ảnh)
vocab.example: If there are too many tourists ruining a beautiful vista, I usually try to crop them out to keep the focus on nature.

vocab.meaning: hiện lên, xuất hiện (trong ảnh/ống kính)
vocab.example: The subtle purple hues of the sunset didn't really show up well on my phone camera, which was quite disappointing.
Whenever I encounter a panoramic view of the coastline, it's an opportunity I simply cannot pass up.

vocab.meaning: chọn ra, nhận ra (giữa nhiều thứ khác)
vocab.example: The camera lens allows me to pick out small details in the distance that the naked eye might overlook.
I take photos of great views primarily so I can look back on my travels with a sense of nostalgia years later.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại, làm hiện lên (hình ảnh/cảm xúc trong tâm trí)
vocab.example: A single photo of a mountain range can conjure up the exact feeling of the crisp air I felt at that moment.

vocab.meaning: loay hoay điều chỉnh (thông số/thiết bị)
vocab.example: I often spend too much time fiddling around with the exposure settings instead of just enjoying the view.
